Title: Relates to the crimes of disruption or disturbance of a religious service, funeral, burial or memorial service in the first degree and second degree
Summary: Designates the crime of disruption or disturbance of a religious service, funeral, burial or memorial service as disruption or disturbance of a religious service, funeral, burial or memorial service in the second degree and adds the crime of disruption or disturbance of a religious service, funeral, burial or memorial service in the first degree as a class E felony.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, in relation to the crimes of disruption or disturbance of a religious service, funeral, burial or memorial service in the first and second degrees
